question: y=secxy=secxy=secx হলে নীচের কোনটি সঠিক?
explanation: y=sec⁡xddx(y)=sec⁡xtan⁡x⇒y1=sec⁡xtan⁡x⇒y2=sec⁡xddx(tan⁡x)+tan⁡xddx(sec⁡x)⇒y2=sec⁡xsec⁡2x+tan⁡xsec⁡xtan⁡x⇒y2=sec⁡3x+{sec⁡x(sec⁡x−1)}⇒y2=sec⁡3x+sec⁡3x−sec⁡x⇒y2=y3+y3−y⇒y2=2y3−y⇒y2=y(2y2−1) \begin{array}{l}y=\sec x \\ \frac{d}{d x}(y)=\sec x \tan x \\ \Rightarrow y_{1}=\sec x \tan x \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=\sec x \frac{d}{d x}(\tan x)+\tan x \frac{d}{d x}(\sec x) \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=\sec x \sec ^{2} x+\tan x \sec x \tan x \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=\sec ^{3} x+\{\sec x(\sec x-1)\} \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=\sec ^{3} x+\sec ^{3} x-\sec x \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=y^{3}+y^{3}-y \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=2 y^{3}-y \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=y\left(2 y^{2}-1\right)\end{array} y=secxdxd(y)=secxtanx⇒y1=secxtanx⇒y2=secxdxd(tanx)+tanxdxd(secx)⇒y2=secxsec2x+tanxsecxtanx⇒y2=sec3x+{secx(secx−1)}⇒y2=sec3x+sec3x−secx⇒y2=y3+y3−y⇒y2=2y3−y⇒y2=y(2y2−1)
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $y=sec⁡xddx(y)=sec⁡xtan⁡x⇒y1=sec⁡xtan⁡x⇒y2=sec⁡xddx(tan⁡x)+tan⁡xddx(sec⁡x)⇒y2=sec⁡xsec⁡2x+tan⁡xsec⁡xtan⁡x⇒y2=sec⁡3x+{sec⁡x(sec⁡x−1)}⇒y2=sec⁡3x+sec⁡3x−sec⁡x⇒y2=y3+y3−y⇒y2=2y3−y⇒y2=y(2y2−1) \begin{array}{l}y=\sec x \\ \frac{d}{d x}(y)=\sec x \tan x \\ \Rightarrow y_{1}=\sec x \tan x \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=\sec x \frac{d}{d x}(\tan x)+\tan x \frac{d}{d x}(\sec x) \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=\sec x \sec ^{2} x+\tan x \sec x \tan x \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=\sec ^{3} x+\{\sec x(\sec x-1)\} \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=\sec ^{3} x+\sec ^{3} x-\sec x \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=y^{3}+y^{3}-y \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=2 y^{3}-y \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=y\left(2 y^{2}-1\right)\end{array} y=secxdxd(y)=secxtanx⇒y1=secxtanx⇒y2=secxdxd(tanx)+tanxdxd(secx)⇒y2=secxsec2x+tanxsecxtanx⇒y2=sec3x+{secx(secx−1)}⇒y2=sec3x+sec3x−secx⇒y2=y3+y3−y⇒y2=2y3−y⇒y2=y(2y2−1)$

explanation: =lim⁡x→a(x7/2−a7/2)lim⁡x→a(x1/2−a1/2)=lim⁡x→ax7/2−a7/2x−alim⁡x→ax1/2−a1/2x−a=72a72−112a12−1[∵lim⁡x→7xn−anx−a=nan−1]=(72×21)a72−1−12+1=7a72−12=7a3 (Ans.) \begin{array}{l} =\frac{\lim _{x \rightarrow a}\left(x^{7 / 2}-a^{7 / 2}\right)}{\lim _{x \rightarrow a}\left(x^{1 / 2}-a^{1 / 2}\right)}=\frac{\lim _{x \rightarrow a} \frac{x^{7 / 2}-a^{7 / 2}}{x-a}}{\lim _{x \rightarrow a} \frac{x^{1 / 2}-a^{1 / 2}}{x-a}} \\ =\frac{\frac{7}{2} a^{\frac{7}{2}-1}}{\frac{1}{2} a^{\frac{1}{2}-1}} \quad\left[\because \lim _{x \rightarrow 7} \frac{x^{n}-a^{n}}{x-a}=n a^{n-1}\right] \\ =\left(\frac{7}{2} \times \frac{2}{1}\right) a^{\frac{7}{2}-1-\frac{1}{2}+1}=7 a^{\frac{7}{2}-\frac{1}{2}}=7 a^{3} \text { (Ans.) } \end{array} =limx→a(x1/2−a1/2)limx→a(x7/2−a7/2)=limx→ax−ax1/2−a1/2limx→ax−ax7/2−a7/2=21a21−127a27−1[∵limx→7x−axn−an=nan−1]=(27×12)a27−1−21+1=7a27−21=7a3 (Ans.)

explanation: lim⁡x→0cos⁡7x−cos⁡9xcos⁡3x−cos⁡5x \lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\cos 7 x-\cos 9 x}{\cos 3 x-\cos 5 x} limx→0cos3x−cos5xcos7x−cos9x cos⁡A−cos⁡B=−2sin⁡(A+B2)sin⁡(A−B2) \cos A-\cos B=-2 \sin \left(\frac{A+B}{2}\right) \sin \left(\frac{A-B}{2}\right) cosA−cosB=−2sin(2A+B)sin(2A−B) cos⁡7x−cos⁡9x=−2sin⁡(7x+9x2)sin⁡(7x−9x2)=−2sin⁡(16x2)sin⁡(−2x2)=−2sin⁡(8x)sin⁡(−x) \begin{aligned} \cos 7 x-\cos 9 x & =-2 \sin \left(\frac{7 x+9 x}{2}\right) \sin \left(\frac{7 x-9 x}{2}\right) \\ = & -2 \sin \left(\frac{16 x}{2}\right) \sin \left(\frac{-2 x}{2}\right) \\ & =-2 \sin (8 x) \sin (-x) \end{aligned} cos7x−cos9x==−2sin(27x+9x)sin(27x−9x)−2sin(216x)sin(2−2x)=−2sin(8x)sin(−x) =−2sin⁡(8x)sin⁡(−x)=2sin⁡(8x)sin⁡x \begin{aligned} = & -2 \sin (8 x) \sin (-x) \\ & =2 \sin (8 x) \sin x \end{aligned} =−2sin(8x)sin(−x)=2sin(8x)sinx cos⁡3x−cos⁡5x=−2sin⁡(3x+5x2)sin⁡(3x−5x2)=−2sin⁡(8x2)sin⁡(−2x2)=−2sin⁡(4x)sin⁡(−x)=2sin⁡(4x)sin⁡x \begin{array}{c} \cos 3 x-\cos 5 x=-2 \sin \left(\frac{3 x+5 x}{2}\right) \sin \left(\frac{3 x-5 x}{2}\right) \\ =-2 \sin \left(\frac{8 x}{2}\right) \sin \left(\frac{-2 x}{2}\right) \\ =-2 \sin (4 x) \sin (-x) \\ =2 \sin (4 x) \sin x \end{array} cos3x−cos5x=−2sin(23x+5x)sin(23x−5x)=−2sin(28x)sin(2−2x)=−2sin(4x)sin(−x)=2sin(4x)sinx 2sin⁡(8x)sin⁡x2sin⁡(4x)sin⁡x=sin⁡(8x)sin⁡(4x) \begin{array}{c} \frac{2 \sin (8 x) \sin x}{2 \sin (4 x) \sin x} \\ =\frac{\sin (8 x)}{\sin (4 x)} \end{array} 2sin(4x)sinx2sin(8x)sinx=sin(4x)sin(8x) lim⁡x→0sin⁡(8x)sin⁡(4x)=lim⁡x→08x4x=2 \lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\sin (8 x)}{\sin (4 x)}=\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{8 x}{4 x}=2 limx→0sin(4x)sin(8x)=limx→04x8x=2 lim⁡x→0cos⁡7x−cos⁡9xcos⁡3x−cos⁡5x=2 \lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\cos 7 x-\cos 9 x}{\cos 3 x-\cos 5 x}=2 limx→0cos3x−cos5xcos7x−cos9x=2

question: নিচের সীমার মান কোনটি? lim⁡x→0ax−a−xx\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{a^{x}-a^{-x}}{x} limx→0xax−a−x
explanation: lim⁡x→0ax−a−xx=lim⁡x→01x[{1+xln⁡a+(xln⁡a)22!+(xln⁡a)33!+⋯ }−{1−xln⁡a+(xln⁡a)22!−(xln⁡a)33!+⋯ }]=lim⁡x→01x{2xln⁡a+2(xln⁡a)33!+⋯⋯ }=2lim⁡x→0{ln⁡a+x2(ln⁡a)33!+x4(ln⁡a)55!+⋯ }=2lim⁡x→0{ln⁡a+02(ln⁡a)33!+04(ln⁡a)55!+⋯ } \begin{aligned} & \lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{a^{x}-a^{-x}}{x} \\ = & \lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{1}{x}\left[\left\{1+x \ln a+\frac{(x \ln a)^{2}}{2 !}+\frac{(x \ln a)^{3}}{3 !}+\cdots\right\}\right. \\ & \left.-\left\{1-x \ln a+\frac{(x \ln a)^{2}}{2 !}-\frac{(x \ln a)^{3}}{3 !}+\cdots\right\}\right] \\ = & \lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{1}{x}\left\{2 x \ln a+2 \frac{(x \ln a)^{3}}{3 !}+\cdots \cdots\right\} \\ = & 2 \lim _{x \rightarrow 0}\left\{\ln a+\frac{x^{2}(\ln a)^{3}}{3 !}+\frac{x^{4}(\ln a)^{5}}{5 !}+\cdots\right\} \\ = & 2 \lim _{x \rightarrow 0}\left\{\ln a+\frac{0^{2}(\ln a)^{3}}{3 !}+\frac{0^{4}(\ln a)^{5}}{5 !}+\cdots\right\} \end{aligned} ====x→0limxax−a−xx→0limx1[{1+xlna+2!(xlna)2+3!(xlna)3+⋯}−{1−xlna+2!(xlna)2−3!(xlna)3+⋯}]x→0limx1{2xlna+23!(xlna)3+⋯⋯}2x→0lim{lna+3!x2(lna)3+5!x4(lna)5+⋯}2x→0lim{lna+3!02(lna)3+5!04(lna)5+⋯} =2ln⁡a (Ans.) =2 \ln a \text { (Ans.) } =2lna (Ans.)

question: y = x³ ln x হলে d4ydx4=? \frac{d^{4} y}{dx^{4}} = ? dx4d4y=?
explanation: y=x3ln⁡x⇒dydx=x3x+3x2ln⁡x⇒dydx=x2+3x2ln⁡x⇒dydx=x2(1+3ln⁡x)⇒d2ydx2=x2⋅3x+2x(1+3ln⁡x)⇒d2ydx2=3x+2x(1+3ln⁡x)⇒d2ydx2=x(3+2+6ln⁡x)⇒d2ydx2=x(5+6ln⁡x)⇒d3ydx3=x⋅6x+1⋅(5+6ln⁡x)⇒d3ydx3=6+5+6ln⁡x⇒d4ydx4=6x \begin{array}{l}y=x^{3} \ln x \\ \Rightarrow \frac{d y}{d x}=\frac{x^{3}}{x}+3 x^{2} \ln x \Rightarrow \frac{d y}{d x}=x^{2}+3 x^{2} \ln x \\ \Rightarrow \frac{d y}{d x}=x^{2}(1+3 \ln x) \Rightarrow \frac{d^{2} y}{d x^{2}}=\frac{x^{2} \cdot 3}{x}+2 x(1+3 \ln x) \\ \Rightarrow \frac{d^{2} y}{d x^{2}}=3 x+2 x(1+3 \ln x) \Rightarrow \frac{d^{2} y}{d x^{2}}=x(3+2+6 \ln x) \\ \Rightarrow \frac{d^{2} y}{d x^{2}}=x(5+6 \ln x) \Rightarrow \frac{d^{3} y}{d x^{3}}=\frac{x \cdot 6}{x}+1 \cdot(5+6 \ln x) \\ \Rightarrow \frac{d^{3} y}{d x^{3}}=6+5+6 \ln x \Rightarrow \frac{d^{4} y}{d x^{4}}=\frac{6}{x}\end{array} y=x3lnx⇒dxdy=xx3+3x2lnx⇒dxdy=x2+3x2lnx⇒dxdy=x2(1+3lnx)⇒dx2d2y=xx2⋅3+2x(1+3lnx)⇒dx2d2y=3x+2x(1+3lnx)⇒dx2d2y=x(3+2+6lnx)⇒dx2d2y=x(5+6lnx)⇒dx3d3y=xx⋅6+1⋅(5+6lnx)⇒dx3d3y=6+5+6lnx⇒dx4d4y=x6

explanation: y=x3−2x2+3∴dydx=3x2−4x y=x^{3}-2 x^{2}+3 \quad \therefore \frac{d y}{d x}=3 x^{2}-4 x y=x3−2x2+3∴dxdy=3x2−4x এখন (2,3) (2,3) (2,3) বিন্দুতে ঢাল dydx=3×22−4×2=4 \frac{d y}{d x}=3 \times 2^{2}-4 \times 2=4 dxdy=3×22−4×2=4 এখন (2,3) (2,3) (2,3) বিন্দুতে স্পর্শকের সমীকরণ, y−3=m(x−2) y-3=m(x-2) y−3=m(x−2) ⇒y−3=4(x−2)⇒y−3=4x−8⇒y=4x−5 \Rightarrow y-3=4(x-2) \Rightarrow y-3=4 x-8 \Rightarrow y=4 x-5 ⇒y−3=4(x−2)⇒y−3=4x−8⇒y=4x−5

question: যদি y = x2 + 1 হয়, তবে কোন বিন্দুতে y এবং dy/dx এর মান সমান হবে?
explanation: dydx=y⇒d(x2+1)dx=x2+1 \begin{aligned} & \frac{d y}{d x}=y \\ \Rightarrow & \frac{d\left(x^{2}+1\right)}{d x}=x^{2}+1\end{aligned} ⇒dxdy=ydxd(x2+1)=x2+1 ⇒2x=x2+1 \Rightarrow 2 x=x^{2}+1 ⇒2x=x2+1 x2−2x+1=0⇒(x−1)2=0⇒x=1 \begin{array}{l} x^{2}-2 x+1=0 \\ \Rightarrow(x-1)^{2}=0 \\ \Rightarrow x=1 \end{array} x2−2x+1=0⇒(x−1)2=0⇒x=1 Then, y=x2+1=1+1=2 \begin{aligned} y & =x^{2}+1 \\ & =1+1 \\ & =2 \end{aligned} y=x2+1=1+1=2

explanation: y=tan⁡−11−x1+x⇒y=tan⁡−11−tan⁡−1x⇒dydx=ddx(tan⁡−11)−ddx(tan⁡−1x)⇒dydx=0−11+x2=−11+x2 \begin{array}{l}y=\tan ^{-1} \frac{1-x}{1+x} \Rightarrow y=\tan ^{-1} 1-\tan ^{-1} x \\ \Rightarrow \frac{d y}{d x}=\frac{d}{d x}\left(\tan ^{-1} 1\right)-\frac{d}{d x}\left(\tan ^{-1} x\right) \\\Rightarrow \frac{d y}{d x}=0-\frac{1}{1+x^{2}}=-\frac{1}{1+x^{2}}\end{array} y=tan−11+x1−x⇒y=tan−11−tan−1x⇒dxdy=dxd(tan−11)−dxd(tan−1x)⇒dxdy=0−1+x21=−1+x21
